## What this changes

<!-- Brief summary. For data: which day/jurisdiction/saints; new vocabulary terms added. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Edited only source (`data/*.csv`, `web/`, `build.py`, docs) — no generated `public/`/`dist/` files.
- [ ] New controlled-vocabulary terms were added to `data/vocabulary.csv` **first**.
- [ ] `make validate` (or `make docker-validate`) is **CLEAN** — zero violations.
- [ ] `make test` passes (if `build.py` changed).
- [ ] New saints were added with **blank** Saint IDs (the build assigns `OS-####`).
- [ ] `Sources` filled on every new/changed row; no fabricated facts; no copyrighted hymns/images.
